# Torensa | Smart Online Tools for Work & Productivity

> A comprehensive collection of free, browser-based tools for productivity, image processing, document conversion, file sharing, and developer workflows.

Torensa provides free online tools designed to enhance work efficiency, streamline file and image management, and facilitate quick digital sharing. Most tools run entirely in the browser — no file uploads to external servers, no login required, instant results.

## Business Tools

### Text to QR Builder
- Generate QR codes from any text, URL, phone number, or email with live preview.
- Optionally embed a logo and short label; export as high-resolution PNG.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Generate QR Code](https://torensa.com/qr-code-generator)

### Barcode Generator
- Create barcodes in Code 128, Code 39, EAN-13, EAN-8, and UPC-A formats.
- Customize width, height, and label display; download as PNG.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Generate Barcode](https://torensa.com/barcode-generator)

### Invoice / Receipt Generator
- Build professional invoices and receipts with line items, taxes, discounts, and shipping.
- Supports any currency; export as PDF. Data saved locally in the browser.
- [Create Invoice](https://torensa.com/invoice-generator)

## Communication Tools

### Easy Share (Text + File)
- Share text and up to 5 files (up to 1 GB each) across devices using a 4-digit code.
- No signup, email, or phone number required. Shares expire after ~1 hour.
- [Open Easy Share](https://torensa.com/easy-share)

## Image Tools

### Image Compressor
- Compress JPG, PNG, and WEBP images locally with a quality slider and before/after preview.
- Download individually or as a ZIP archive. No uploads, fully private.
- [Compress Images](https://torensa.com/image-compressor)

### Image Format Converter
- Convert images between PNG, JPG, WEBP, and BMP formats entirely in the browser.
- [Convert Image Format](https://torensa.com/image-format-converter)

### Image Crop Tool
- Crop images with an interactive selection overlay; supports aspect ratio constraints.
- Export as PNG, JPEG, or WEBP.
- [Crop Image](https://torensa.com/image-crop-tool)

### Image Background Remover / Changer
- Remove the background to get a transparent PNG, fill with a solid color, or swap in a custom background image.
- Uses AI-based segmentation (server-side); requires internet connection.
- [Edit Image Background](https://torensa.com/image-background-editor)

### AI Image Generator
- Describe any image in plain English and AI (Amazon Titan via AWS Bedrock) generates it.
- Output is a 1024×1024 PNG. Requires internet connection.
- [Generate AI Image](https://torensa.com/image-generator)

## PDF & Document Tools

### Image / PDF Merger
- Combine multiple images (PNG, JPG, WEBP) and PDFs into one PDF.
- Reorder pages, rotate images, set page size/margins, and optionally add page numbers.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Merge to PDF](https://torensa.com/pdf-merger)

### PDF Splitter
- Extract a page range or split every page into individual PDFs (downloaded as ZIP).
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Split PDF](https://torensa.com/pdf-splitter)

### Word to PDF Converter
- Convert .doc and .docx files to PDF using LibreOffice on the server.
- Preserves fonts, tables, images, and formatting. Files are never stored.
- [Convert Word to PDF](https://torensa.com/word-to-pdf)

### Excel to PDF Converter
- Convert .xls, .xlsx, and .xlsm spreadsheets to PDF; charts and formatting preserved.
- [Convert Excel to PDF](https://torensa.com/excel-to-pdf)

### PDF to Word Converter
- Convert PDF files to editable .docx documents using LibreOffice. Files are never stored.
- [Convert PDF to Word](https://torensa.com/pdf-to-word)

### PDF Text Extractor (OCR)
- Extract text from digital PDFs (direct parse) or scanned PDFs (Tesseract OCR).
- Copy to clipboard or download as .txt.
- [Extract PDF Text](https://torensa.com/pdf-text-extractor)

## Data & Media Tools

### Data Files Converter
- Convert between Excel (.xlsx), CSV, and JSON entirely in the browser.
- [Convert Data Files](https://torensa.com/data-format-converter)

### Subtitle Downloader
- Paste a video URL to download SRT subtitles via yt-dlp; falls back to auto-generated captions.
- Supports YouTube and other yt-dlp-compatible sites.
- [Download Subtitles](https://torensa.com/subtitle-downloader)

### Speech to Text Converter
- Upload an audio file (MP3, WAV, MP4, M4A, FLAC, OGG, WEBM) and receive a transcript.
- Powered by Amazon Transcribe (AWS). Download result as .txt.
- [Speech to Text](https://torensa.com/speech-to-text)

### Habit Tracker
- Track daily habits with custom point values; visualize 14-day progress as a bar chart.
- Data stored locally in the browser. Requires login.
- [Track Habits](https://torensa.com/habit-tracker)

## Developer Tools

### Text Difference Checker
- Paste two versions of text to see line-by-line additions and removals.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Compare Text](https://torensa.com/text-diff-checker)

### JSON Formatter + Validator
- Validate, pretty-print, and minify JSON; includes a diff mode to compare two JSON objects.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Format JSON](https://torensa.com/json-formatter-validator)

### Spring Boot Log Analyzer
- Paste or upload Spring Boot logs to identify root-cause exceptions, stack traces, and correlation IDs.
- Export a structured JSON incident report.
- [Analyze Logs](https://torensa.com/spring-boot-log-analyzer)

### AI Cron Generator + Validator
- Describe a schedule in plain English and AI (Claude via AWS Bedrock) generates the cron expression.
- Validates syntax, explains in plain English, and previews next 5 run times. Supports 5-field and 6-field formats.
- [Open Cron Tool](https://torensa.com/cron-generator-validator)

### JWT Encoder / Decoder
- Decode any JWT to inspect header, payload, and claims; encode new tokens with HS256 or HS512.
- All operations are client-side — tokens never leave your browser.
- [Open JWT Tool](https://torensa.com/jwt-decoder-encoder)

### UUID Generator
- Generate 1–100 UUID v4 values at once; options for uppercase and hyphen-free formats.
- Works fully offline once loaded.
- [Generate UUID](https://torensa.com/uuid-generator)

### String Encryptor / Decryptor
- Encrypt and decrypt text with a secret key using AES.
- Includes a Jasypt-compatible server mode for Spring Boot configuration encryption.
- [Open Encryptor](https://torensa.com/string-encryptor)

### Torensa API Forge
- Send HTTP requests (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE) directly from the browser.
- Supports JWT Bearer auth, custom headers, query params, and JSON body.
- [Open API Forge](https://torensa.com/api-request-builder)

## Resources

- [All Tools](https://torensa.com)
- [Sitemap](https://torensa.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Privacy Policy](https://torensa.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://torensa.com/terms)

## Notes

- Most tools process data entirely client-side in the browser — no files are sent to external servers.
- Tools that require a server (document conversion, AI features, background removal, speech-to-text) process files in memory and do not store them.
- New tools are added continuously.
- Most tools require no account or login. Habit Tracker requires login.
